name: Neto by Maropost Release Notes – 4 Nov 2024
body: [{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Overview","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"This release contains updates for POS version "},{"text":"v.1.31.0.","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Enhancements and Updates","bold":true}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Add Notes Against Orders in Neto POS","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"POS Operators can now add notes against the orders in Neto POS. The "},{"text":"Add Note +","bold":true},{"text":" button, available on the Order Completion page, enables you to add a note for the order, which is then visible in the control panel as "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/edit-a-sales-order#9","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"sticky notes"}]},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"You can edit or delete the note in Neto POS before completing the sale."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/NotesPOS.068J1000006W7jXIAS.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/NotesPOS.068J1000006W7jXIAS.png","name":"NotesPOS","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":765,"width":1600}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"View Order Notes in Neto POS Sales History ","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"A new column - Notes - has been added to the POS Sales History page. Here, you can click the Notes icon to see the notes added for the specific sale."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/POSNotes.068J1000006W7jcIAC.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/POSNotes.068J1000006W7jcIAC.png","name":"POS Notes","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":761,"width":1600}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]
